mapper.insert: INSERT INTO VISITOR ( V_NO, MINIHOME_NO , REPORT_CODE , V_WRITER_NO , V_CREATE_DATE , V_MODIFY_DATE , V_CONTENT , V_SECRET , V_REPORT , V_ACCESS , V_STATUS ) VALUES ( (SELECT NEXTVAL('VISITOR_SEQ') FROM DUAL), #{minihomeNo}, DEFAULT, #{userNo}, DEFAULT, DEFAULT, #{content}, #{secret}, DEFAULT, DEFAULT, DEFAULT )
mapper.select: SELECT ROWNUM, SUB.V_NO, SUB.MINIHOME_NO, SUB.REPORT_CODE, SUB.V_CREATE_DATE, SUB.V_MODIFY_DATE, SUB.V_CONTENT, SUB.V_SECRET, SUB.V_REPORT, SUB.V_ACCESS, SUB.V_STATUS, SUB.M_USER_NO, SUB.M_USER_ID, SUB.M_NAME, SUB.M_PHONE, SUB.M_EMAIL, SUB.M_SEARCH_ME, SUB.M_GENDER, SUB.M_MINIMI, SUB.M_STATUS, VRE.VRE_NO AS R_VRE_NO, VRE.V_NO AS R_V_NO, VRE.VRE_CREATE_DATE AS R_VRE_CREATE_DATE, VRE.VRE_MODIFY_DATE AS R_VRE_MODIFY_DATE, VRE.VRE_CONTENT AS R_VRE_CONTENT, VRE.VRE_SECRET AS R_VRE_SECRET, VRE.VRE_ACCESS AS R_VRE_ACCESS, VRE.VRE_STATUS AS R_VRE_STATUS, VRE.VRE_DEPTH AS R_VRE_DEPTH, VRE.VRE_GROUP AS R_VRE_GROUP, VRE.VRE_STEP AS R_VRE_STEP, VRE.USER_NO AS R_VRM_USER_NO, VRE.USER_ID AS R_VRM_USER_ID, VRE.NAME AS R_VRM_NAME, VRE.PHONE AS R_VRM_PHONE, VRE.EMAIL AS R_VRM_EMAIL, VRE.SEARCH_ME AS R_VRM_SEARCH_ME, VRE.GENDER AS R_VRM_GENDER, VRE.MINIMI AS R_VRM_MINIMI, VRE.STATUS AS R_VRM_STATUS FROM (SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY V.V_CREATE_DATE) AS ROWNUM, V.V_NO, V.MINIHOME_NO , V.REPORT_CODE , V.V_CREATE_DATE , V.V_MODIFY_DATE , V.V_CONTENT , V.V_SECRET , V.V_REPORT , V.V_ACCESS , V.V_STATUS, V.V_WRITER_NO AS M_USER_NO, M.USER_ID AS M_USER_ID, M.NAME AS M_NAME, M.PHONE AS M_PHONE, M.EMAIL AS M_EMAIL, M.SEARCH_ME AS M_SEARCH_ME, M.GENDER AS M_GENDER, M.MINIMI AS M_MINIMI, M.STATUS AS M_STATUS FROM VISITOR V INNER JOIN MINIHOME H ON (V.MINIHOME_NO = H.MINIHOME_NO) INNER JOIN MEMBER M ON (M.USER_NO = V.V_WRITER_NO) WHERE V.MINIHOME_NO = #{minihomeNo} AND V.V_STATUS = 'Y' ) SUB LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT VRE_NO , V_NO , VRE_CREATE_DATE , VRE_MODIFY_DATE , VRE_CONTENT , VRE_SECRET , VRE_ACCESS , VRE_STATUS , VRE_DEPTH , VRE_GROUP , VRE_STEP , VRM.USER_NO, VRM.USER_ID , VRM.NAME , VRM.PHONE , VRM.EMAIL , VRM.BIRTH , VRM.ADDRESS , VRM.SEARCH_ME , VRM.GENDER , VRM.MINIMI , VRM.STATUS FROM VISITOR_REFLY VRE INNER JOIN MEMBER VRM ON (VRM.USER_NO = VRE.VRE_WRITER_NO) WHERE VRE.VRE_STATUS = 'Y' ) VRE ON (SUB.V_NO = VRE.V_NO) ORDER BY SUB.V_CREATE_DATE DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO VISITOR_REFLY ( VRE_NO, V_NO, VRE_WRITER_NO , VRE_CREATE_DATE , VRE_MODIFY_DATE , VRE_CONTENT , VRE_SECRET , VRE_ACCESS , VRE_STATUS , VRE_DEPTH ) VALUES( (SELECT NEXTVAL('VRE_SEQ') FROM DUAL), #{visitorNo}, #{writerNo}, DEFAULT, DEFAULT, #{content}, DEFAULT, DEFAULT, DEFAULT, 0 )
mapper.select: SELECT V_NO , MINIHOME_NO , REPORT_CODE , V_CREATE_DATE , V_MODIFY_DATE , V_CONTENT , V_SECRET , V_REPORT , V_ACCESS , V_STATUS , V_WRITER_NO AS M_USER_NO, M.USER_ID AS M_USER_ID, M.NAME AS M_NAME, M.PHONE AS M_PHONE, M.EMAIL AS M_EMAIL, M.BIRTH AS M_BIRTH, M.ADDRESS AS M_ADDRESS, M.SEARCH_ME AS M_SEARCH_ME, M.GENDER AS M_GENDER, M.MINIMI AS M_MINIMI FROM VISITOR V INNER JOIN MEMBER M ON (V.V_WRITER_NO = M.USER_NO) WHERE V_NO = #{visitorNo} AND V_STATUS = 'Y'
mapper.update: UPDATE VISITOR SET V_CONTENT = #{content}, V_MODIFY_DATE = NOW() WHERE V_NO = #{visitorNo}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO REPORT ( REPORT_NO, CATEGORYCODE, USER_ID, CONTENT, DATE, STATUS, ALLPK_NO, REPORT_CODE ) VALUES( (SELECT NEXTVAL('REPORT_SEQ') FROM DUAL), #{categoryCode}, #{userId}, #{content}, DEFAULT, DEFAULT, #{visitorNo}, #{reportCode} )
mapper.select: SELECT MINIHOME_NO, PROFILE, INTRO, MOOD, MBTI, MINIROOM, THEME, MH_ACCESS , M.USER_NO AS M_USER_NO, M.USER_ID AS M_USER_ID, M.NAME AS M_NAME, M.PHONE AS M_PHONE, M.EMAIL AS M_EMAIL, M.BIRTH AS M_BIRTH, M.ADDRESS AS M_ADDRESS, M.SEARCH_ME AS M_SEARCH_ME, M.GENDER AS M_GENDER, M.MINIMI AS M_MINIMI, M.CREATE_DATE AS M_CREATE_DATE, M.ACORN AS M_ACORN, M.STATUS AS M_STATUS FROM MINIHOME MH INNER JOIN MEMBER M ON (MH.USER_NO = M.USER_NO) WHERE MINIHOME_NO = #{minihomeNo} AND M.STATUS = 'Y'
mapper.update: UPDATE VISITOR_REFLY SET VRE_CONTENT = #{content}, VRE_MODIFY_DATE = NOW() WHERE VRE_NO = #{vreNo} AND V_NO = #{visitorNo} AND VRE_WRITER_NO = #{userNo}
mapper.select: SELECT VRE_NO, V_NO, VRE_WRITER_NO, VRE_CREATE_DATE , VRE_MODIFY_DATE , VRE_CONTENT , VRE_SECRET , VRE_ACCESS , VRE_STATUS , VRE_DEPTH , VRE_GROUP , VRE_STEP FROM VISITOR_REFLY WHERE VRE_NO = #{vreNo}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO VISITOR_REFLY ( VRE_NO , V_NO , VRE_WRITER_NO , VRE_CREATE_DATE , VRE_MODIFY_DATE , VRE_CONTENT , VRE_SECRET , VRE_ACCESS , VRE_STATUS , VRE_DEPTH , VRE_GROUP , VRE_STEP ) VALUES( (SELECT NEXTVAL('VRE_SEQ') FROM DUAL), #{visitorNo}, #{writer.no}, DEFAULT, DEFAULT, #{content}, DEFAULT, DEFAULT, DEFAULT, 1, #{vreNo}, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM VISITOR_REFLY VR WHERE VRE_GROUP = #{vreNo}) )
mapper.update: UPDATE VISITOR_REFLY SET VRE_CONTENT = #{content}, VRE_MODIFY_DATE = NOW() WHERE VRE_NO = #{vreNo} AND VRE_GROUP = #{group} AND VRE_STEP = #{step}
